analysis.summary_en: Split tape: TSMC (+1.46%) holds up the index while the rest of semis get hit hard — MediaTek -3.5%, UMC -6.4%, Nanya -3.9%, Largan -3.9%. TSM ADR surged 5.26% overnight vs local 2330 only +1.46%, a 3.8pt gap suggesting local price hasn't fully absorbed overnight bullish TSMC signal. UMC shows a massive 9.44pt ADR-local divergence the other way — local crushed while ADR rose, likely stale pricing or foreign-vs-local flow mismatch. Memory/HBM tailwind from SK Hynix commentary not reflected in Taiwan memory names, which are weak. Tone mixed-to-risk-off under the hood despite EWT +3.18%.
analysis.summary_zh: 盤面分歧:台積電(+1.46%)獨撐大盤,其餘半導體重挫——聯發科-3.5%、聯電-6.4%、南亞科-3.9%、大立光-3.9%。台積電ADR昨夜暴漲5.26%,本地僅+1.46%,3.8個百分點的價差顯示本地尚未完全反映夜盤利多。聯電ADR與本地出現9.44個百分點的反向背離(ADR漲、本地重挫),可能是外資與本地資金流向錯配。SK海力士HBM結構性缺貨的利多未反映在台灣記憶體股。EWT+3.18%雖亮眼,但盤面底下偏避險。

key_stories.headline_en: SK Hynix flags persistent HBM shortage and structural memory upcycle
key_stories.headline_zh: SK海力士表示HBM結構性缺貨、記憶體進入結構性上行週期
key_stories.analysis_en: SK Hynix delivered two bullish memory signals (structural upcycle + persistent HBM shortage). Yet UMC -6.36% and ASE -0.11% locally are not pricing this in. UMC's 9.44pt ADR-local divergence is the standout — foreign investors bid up UMC ADR while local tape sold aggressively. Mechanism: likely local retail/margin unwind and rotation out of non-AI foundry into TSMC, not fundamental. Falsifier: if tomorrow's foreign net-buy shows continued selling of UMC, then this is a real derating not a divergence to fade.
key_stories.analysis_zh: SK海力士釋出兩項記憶體利多(結構性上行+HBM持續短缺),但本地聯電-6.36%、日月光-0.11%並未反映。聯電ADR與本地9.44個百分點的背離最為突出——外資搶買聯電ADR,本地盤卻被殺低。機制:可能是本地散戶/融資斷頭及資金從非AI晶圓代工輪動到台積電,非基本面問題。證偽條件:若明日外資籌碼顯示續賣聯電,則為真實評價下修,而非短期背離。

key_stories.headline_en: TSM ADR +5.26% vs local 2330 +1.46% — 3.8pt overnight gap
key_stories.headline_zh: 台積電ADR漲5.26%、本地僅漲1.46%,隔夜價差3.8個百分點
key_stories.analysis_en: Local TSMC lagged the ADR move materially. High of NT$2135 was hit intraday but closed at 2080, suggesting sellers capped the gap-fill. Likely local profit-taking and index hedging as TAIEX was down. If ADR strength reflects real overnight news (earnings/guidance/NVDA-related), local has catch-up room next session. Falsifier: if TSM ADR gives back the 5% tonight, the gap closes from the top and this is not actionable.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 本地台積電明顯落後ADR。盤中觸及2135但收在2080,顯示賣壓壓抑補漲幅度。可能為本地獲利了結與加權指數避險所致。若ADR強勢反映真實隔夜利多(財報/展望/輝達相關),本地次日有補漲空間。證偽條件:若今晚TSM ADR回吐5%漲幅,價差由上端收斂,則無交易價值。

key_stories.headline_en: MediaTek -3.49%, Largan -3.88%, Nanya -3.87% — non-TSMC tech broadly sold
key_stories.headline_zh: 聯發科-3.49%、大立光-3.88%、南亞科-3.87%,非台積電科技股普遍遭賣壓
key_stories.analysis_en: Synchronized 3-4% drops across unrelated subsectors (IC design, optics, memory) on no single catalyst suggest broad foreign sell-program or rotation concentrated into TSMC/Hon Hai. Hon Hai +1.81% on huge volume (172M) supports rotation thesis. Mechanism: sympathy selling within 'non-TSMC tech' basket. Falsifier: if foreign net-sell tomorrow is heavy and broad, this is risk-off not rotation; if TSMC + Hon Hai continue to lead solo, rotation confirmed and laggards may find floor.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 不相關子產業(IC設計、光學、記憶體)同步下跌3-4%,無單一催化事件,顯示外資賣超廣泛或資金集中輪動至台積電/鴻海。鴻海+1.81%伴隨巨量(1.72億股)支持輪動論點。機制:「非台積電科技股」類股同步賣壓。證偽條件:若明日外資賣超廣泛且沉重,則為避險非輪動;若台積電+鴻海續領,則輪動確立,落後股可能打底。

key_stories.headline_en: LandMark Optoelectronics Q1 profit +650%, locks 5-year InP supply with Sumitomo
key_stories.headline_zh: 聯亞光電Q1獲利暴增650%,與住友電工簽5年InP基板供應合約
key_stories.analysis_en: Pure silicon photonics / AI optical beneficiary. Not in the provided tape but worth flagging as a Michael's-wife watchlist candidate if not already held. 5-year InP supply lock-in is the meaningful part — it removes the single-point-of-failure risk in SiPh epitaxy supply chain. Falsifier: if AI capex narrative cracks (e.g., hyperscaler capex cuts), SiPh names derate regardless of lock-in.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 純矽光子/AI光通訊受惠股。雖未在提供的盤面中,值得加入觀察名單。5年InP供應鎖定是重點,消除矽光子磊晶供應鏈單點風險。證偽條件:若AI資本支出敘事轉弱(如雲端業者砍資本支出),矽光子族群不論鎖料與否皆會遭評價下修。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: ADR materially ahead. Local has catch-up room if ADR holds tonight; watch pre-market TSM for confirmation before acting.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: ADR顯著領先。若今晚TSM守住漲幅,本地次日有補漲空間;進場前先觀察美股盤前TSM走勢確認。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Huge reverse divergence: ADR +3.08% while local -6.36%. Unusual and suggests either local margin/panic selling disconnected from fundamentals, or foreign ADR buyers missing local-only bad news. Do not chase either side until the source is identified — check foreign net-buy data and any Chinese-language local news before position.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 巨大反向背離:ADR+3.08%、本地-6.36%。異常,可能是本地融資斷頭/恐慌賣壓與基本面脫鉤,或外資ADR買盤忽略本地獨有利空。在釐清原因前切勿追價——進場前確認外資買賣超及中文本地新聞。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Local -6.92% vs ADR only -0.77%. Local oversold relative to ADR — possible bounce candidate if no stock-specific local news surfaces.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 本地-6.92%、ADR僅-0.77%。本地相對ADR超賣——若無個股利空浮現,可能為反彈候選。

analysis.no_signals_note: Caveat: ADR-local divergences this wide (UMC 9.44pt, HIMX 6.15pt) often indicate missing news rather than tradeable gaps. Verify with local Chinese news and tomorrow's foreign net-buy figures before acting. No single high-conviction trade tonight.
